calendar_era.name: Ashfall Reckoning
calendar_era.year_zero_event: Last Ember Citadel collapse, sky choked with ash

magic_system.name: Soul Forging
magic_system.rules: Magic burns caster's lifespan. Each spell consumes hours, days, or years depending on scale. Spells permanently scar skin where cast. No external power source—only internal soul fuel.
magic_system.cost: Years of life, permanent disfigurement, eventual soul-death (void mind, empty husk)

races.name: Ashborn
races.traits: Pallid skin, ash-filter lungs, short-lived (40 years), immune to smoke toxins
races.culture: Cremation cults, ancestor ash ingestion, fatalist poetry

races.name: Driftkin
races.traits: Translucent eyes, hollow bones, weigh half normal, cannot sink in water
races.culture: Sky burial, wind divination, nomad fleets on acid seas

races.name: Veinrock
races.traits: Stone-flesh hybrid, grow mineral outcroppings, move slow, live centuries
races.culture: Law carved in bedrock, debt measured in stone weight, no lying

races.name: Hollow
races.traits: No reflection, no shadow, born without souls (cannot use magic), immune to soul-costs
races.culture: Mercenary trade, feared as omens, paid in memories not coin

factions.name: Cinder Tribunal
factions.goal: Regulate all magic use, execute unlicensed casters

factions.name: The Unwritten
factions.goal: Collect pre-Ashfall knowledge, restore lost spells

factions.name: Driftkin Concord
factions.goal: Control sea trade routes, sink land-dweller ships

factions.name: Stone Oath
factions.goal: Preserve Veinrock law across all borders, punish oathbreakers

characters.name: Kael Vorn
characters.personality: Bitter, precise, secretly hoards stolen years
abilities: Life-theft blade (steals victim's remaining years, adds to caster)
Smoke-step (teleport through ash clouds, costs 1 day)

characters.name: Verra Cinder
abilities: Age-transfer (push years onto other, costs double)
Pyre-sight (see all magic use in 10 leagues, costs 1 year/minute)
Last-stand (burn all remaining life for nova blast)

characters.name: Brek-of-Three-Depths
abilities: Statue-kin (animate stone servants, costs 10 years each)
Weight-sense (detect lies via mass shift, costs 2 years)

locations.name: Threnod
locations.description: Ash-choked capital, perpetual gray, pyramids of dead, smoke vents everywhere

locations.name: The Sour Deeps
locations.description: Acid ocean, no fish live, only driftkin ships float, corrosive fog

locations.name: Oth-Mora
locations.description: Veinrock judicial city, carved in prime granite, silence enforced by law

locations.name: Last Ember Ruin
locations.description: Crater of year zero, glassed sand, reality thin, ghosts of pre-ash mages

items.name: The Debt Ledger
items.power: Records all soul-costs spent within 1 league, can transfer unpaid costs to named target
items.origin: First Cinder Tribunal inquisitor, burned alive inside it

items.name: Hollow Needle
items.power: Strikes bypass all magic defenses, wounds cannot be healed by magic
items.origin: Hollow martyr who chose death to forge it

items.name: Stillborn Hourglass
items.power: Freezes time for 1 hour for all but user, costs 10 years per use
items.origin: Ashborn chronomancer who aged to dust mid-cast

historical_events.name: The Collapse
historical_events.description: Last Ember Citadel mages burned collective centuries attempting immortality ritual, ignited ashfall

historical_events.name: The Pact of Weights
historical_events.description: Veinrock and Driftkin agree sea borders measured in stone dropped, not leagues sailed

historical_events.name: Null Night
historical_events.description: Hollow assassin kills three Tribunal inquisitors, proves soul-less immune to magic law

historical_events.name: The Stillbirth
historical_events.description: Chronomancer creates hourglass, dies, artifact seized by Tribunal

world_rules.name: Conservation of Soul
world_rules.description: Magic cannot create or destroy soul-stuff, only move or consume it

world_rules.name: Ashfall Persistence
world_rules.description: Sky ash never settles fully, respawns from Last Ember Ruin weekly

world_rules.name: Stone Truth
world_rules.description: Veinrock cannot utter falsehood, pain strikes if attempted

world_rules.name: Hollow Exclusion
world_rules.description: Gods (if exist) do not see Hollow, cannot bless or curse them
